description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Trigger A creature hits you with a Strike from a weapon that deals energy damage

Effect Your shell emits a burst of light to blind your assailants. All adjacent creatures and the creature that hit you must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|options:inflicts:blinded,inflicts:dazzled] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, a creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] for 1 round. On a critical failure, a creature is instead @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Blinded] for 1 round, then dazzled for 1 round.
